title: Chinese-Japanese Vocabulary Cards
author: Brainstorming
prompt:
<image_prompt_template>
  <scene_description>
    A detailed, vibrant, educational illustration of a Shinkansen (Bullet Train) interior.
    Style: Modern 3D cartoon / clean vector illustration (Pixar style).
    Aspect Ratio: 16:9 (ultra-wide).
    Layout: CRITICAL - The layout must be SPARSE and UNCLUTTERED. Objects must be spread out significantly (ceiling, floor, foreground seats, background aisle) to allow clear space for labels.
    Top Banner Title: "新幹線 (Shinkansen) / 新干线".
  </scene_description>

  <forced_binding_list>
    <binding_item>
      <exact_text_to_render>
        Line 1 (Bold): **座席**
        Line 2 (Small): /[ざせき]/
        Line 3 (Medium): 座位
      </exact_text_to_render>
      <visual_object_description>Blue, comfortable cushioned passenger seat in the foreground.</visual_object_description>
      <anchor_point_directive>Leader line must point precisely to the center of the seat cushion.</anchor_point_directive>
    </binding_item>

    <binding_item>
      <exact_text_to_render>
        Line 1 (Bold): **テーブル**
        Line 2 (Small): /[te-buru]/
        Line 3 (Medium): 小桌板
      </exact_text_to_render>
      <visual_object_description>Fold-down table attached to the back of the seat, currently open.</visual_object_description>
      <anchor_point_directive>Leader line must point to the flat surface of the tray table.</anchor_point_directive>
    </binding_item>

    <binding_item>
      <exact_text_to_render>
        Line 1 (Bold): **窓**
        Line 2 (Small): /[まど]/
        Line 3 (Medium): 窗户
      </exact_text_to_render>
      <visual_object_description>Large rectangular train window showing a blurred landscape outside.</visual_object_description>
      <anchor_point_directive>Leader line must point to the glass of the window.</anchor_point_directive>
    </binding_item>

    <binding_item>
      <exact_text_to_render>
        Line 1 (Bold): **通路**
        Line 2 (Small): /[つうろ]/
        Line 3 (Medium): 过道
      </exact_text_to_render>
      <visual_object_description>The clean floor space walkway between the rows of seats.</visual_object_description>
      <anchor_point_directive>Leader line must point to the floor of the aisle.</anchor_point_directive>
    </binding_item>

    <binding_item>
      <exact_text_to_render>
        Line 1 (Bold): **網棚**
        Line 2 (Small): /[あみだな]/
        Line 3 (Medium): 行李架
      </exact_text_to_render>
      <visual_object_description>Overhead shelf above the seats for storing bags.</visual_object_description>
      <anchor_point_directive>Leader line must point to the shelf structure above the window.</anchor_point_directive>
    </binding_item>

    <binding_item>
      <exact_text_to_render>
        Line 1 (Bold): **切符**
        Line 2 (Small): /[きっぷ]/
        Line 3 (Medium): 车票
      </exact_text_to_render>
      <visual_object_description>A small rectangular train ticket resting on the tray table.</visual_object_description>
      <anchor_point_directive>Leader line must point to the ticket.</anchor_point_directive>
    </binding_item>

    <binding_item>
      <exact_text_to_render>
        Line 1 (Bold): **車掌**
        Line 2 (Small): /[しゃしょう]/
        Line 3 (Medium): 列车员
      </exact_text_to_render>
      <visual_object_description>A uniformed train staff member standing in the aisle background.</visual_object_description>
      <anchor_point_directive>Leader line must point to the conductor.</anchor_point_directive>
    </binding_item>

    <binding_item>
      <exact_text_to_render>
        Line 1 (Bold): **駅弁**
        Line 2 (Small): /[えきべん]/
        Line 3 (Medium): 车站便当
      </exact_text_to_render>
      <visual_object_description>A colorful bento box lunch placed on the tray table.</visual_object_description>
      <anchor_point_directive>Leader line must point to the bento box.</anchor_point_directive>
    </binding_item>

    <binding_item>
      <exact_text_to_render>
        Line 1 (Bold): **コンセント**
        Line 2 (Small): /[konsento]/
        Line 3 (Medium): 插座
      </exact_text_to_render>
      <visual_object_description>Electrical outlet located near the base of the wall or seat.</visual_object_description>
      <anchor_point_directive>Leader line must point to the socket holes.</anchor_point_directive>
    </binding_item>

    <binding_item>
      <exact_text_to_render>
        Line 1 (Bold): **フック**
        Line 2 (Small): /[fukku]/
        Line 3 (Medium): 挂钩
      </exact_text_to_render>
      <visual_object_description>Small hook on the wall next to the window or seat back.</visual_object_description>
      <anchor_point_directive>Leader line must point to the small hook.</anchor_point_directive>
    </binding_item>

    <binding_item>
      <exact_text_to_render>
        Line 1 (Bold): **ブラインド**
        Line 2 (Small): /[buraindo]/
        Line 3 (Medium): 遮光帘
      </exact_text_to_render>
      <visual_object_description>Sunshade pulled halfway down over the window.</visual_object_description>
      <anchor_point_directive>Leader line must point to the pulled-down shade.</anchor_point_directive>
    </binding_item>

    <binding_item>
      <exact_text_to_render>
        Line 1 (Bold): **ヘッドカバー**
        Line 2 (Small): /[heddokaba-]/
        Line 3 (Medium): 头靠套
      </exact_text_to_render>
      <visual_object_description>White cloth cover on the top part of the seat.</visual_object_description>
      <anchor_point_directive>Leader line must point to the white cloth on the headrest.</anchor_point_directive>
    </binding_item>

    <binding_item>
      <exact_text_to_render>
        Line 1 (Bold): **荷物**
        Line 2 (Small): /[にもつ]/
        Line 3 (Medium): 行李
      </exact_text_to_render>
      <visual_object_description>A suitcase placed securely on the overhead rack.</visual_object_description>
      <anchor_point_directive>Leader line must point to the suitcase.</anchor_point_directive>
    </binding_item>

    <binding_item>
      <exact_text_to_render>
        Line 1 (Bold): **肘掛け**
        Line 2 (Small): /[ひじかけ]/
        Line 3 (Medium): 扶手
      </exact_text_to_render>
      <visual_object_description>The armrest between two seats.</visual_object_description>
      <anchor_point_directive>Leader line must point to the armrest.</anchor_point_directive>
    </binding_item>

    <binding_item>
      <exact_text_to_render>
        Line 1 (Bold): **お茶**
        Line 2 (Small): /[おちゃ]/
        Line 3 (Medium): 茶
      </exact_text_to_render>
      <visual_object_description>A green tea plastic bottle sitting on the tray table.</visual_object_description>
      <anchor_point_directive>Leader line must point to the tea bottle.</anchor_point_directive>
    </binding_item>

    <binding_item>
      <exact_text_to_render>
        Line 1 (Bold): **電光掲示板**
        Line 2 (Small): /[でんこうけいじばん]/
        Line 3 (Medium): 电子显示屏
      </exact_text_to_render>
      <visual_object_description>Scrolling text display board above the door at the end of the car.</visual_object_description>
      <anchor_point_directive>Leader line must point to the scrolling text display.</anchor_point_directive>
    </binding_item>

    <binding_item>
      <exact_text_to_render>
        Line 1 (Bold): **レバー**
        Line 2 (Small): /[reba-]/
        Line 3 (Medium): 调节杆
      </exact_text_to_render>
      <visual_object_description>Small lever on the side of the armrest for reclining.</visual_object_description>
      <anchor_point_directive>Leader line must point to the lever.</anchor_point_directive>
    </binding_item>

    <binding_item>
      <exact_text_to_render>
        Line 1 (Bold): **ゴミ箱**
        Line 2 (Small): /[ごみばこ]/
        Line 3 (Medium): 垃圾箱
      </exact_text_to_render>
      <visual_object_description>Small trash receptacle visible near the aisle door background.</visual_object_description>
      <anchor_point_directive>Leader line must point to the trash can.</anchor_point_directive>
    </binding_item>

    <binding_item>
      <exact_text_to_render>
        Line 1 (Bold): **照明**
        Line 2 (Small): /[しょうめい]/
        Line 3 (Medium): 照明灯
      </exact_text_to_render>
      <visual_object_description>Long sleek lights embedded in the ceiling.</visual_object_description>
      <anchor_point_directive>Leader line must point to the ceiling light.</anchor_point_directive>
    </binding_item>

    <binding_item>
      <exact_text_to_render>
        Line 1 (Bold): **乗客**
        Line 2 (Small): /[じょうきゃく]/
        Line 3 (Medium): 乘客
      </exact_text_to_render>
      <visual_object_description>A person sitting in one of the seats, looking relaxed.</visual_object_description>
      <anchor_point_directive>Leader line must point to the person.</anchor_point_directive>
    </binding_item>
  </forced_binding_list>
</image_prompt_template>
promptZh:
<image_prompt_template>
  <scene_description>
    新干线（子弹头列车）内部的详细、生动、教育性插图。
    风格：现代3D卡通/简洁矢量插图（皮克斯风格）。
    宽高比：16:9（超宽屏）。
    布局：关键——布局必须稀疏且整洁。物体必须显著分散（天花板、地板、前景座椅、背景过道），以留出清晰空间供标签使用。
    顶部横幅标题：“新幹線 (Shinkansen) / 新干线”。
  </scene_description>

  <forced_binding_list>
    <binding_item>
      <exact_text_to_render>
        Line 1 (Bold): **座席**
        Line 2 (Small): /[ざせき]/
        Line 3 (Medium): 座位
      </exact_text_to_render>
      <visual_object_description>前景中蓝色的舒适软垫乘客座椅。</visual_object_description>
      <anchor_point_directive>引线必须精确指向座垫中心。</anchor_point_directive>
    </binding_item>

    <binding_item>
      <exact_text_to_render>
        Line 1 (Bold): **テーブル**
        Line 2 (Small): /[te-buru]/
        Line 3 (Medium): 小桌板
      </exact_text_to_render>
      <visual_object_description>安装在座椅背面的折叠桌，当前处于打开状态。</visual_object_description>
      <anchor_point_directive>引线必须指向托盘桌的平面表面。</anchor_point_directive>
    </binding_item>

    <binding_item>
      <exact_text_to_render>
        Line 1 (Bold): **窓**
        Line 2 (Small): /[まど]/
        Line 3 (Medium): 窗户
      </exact_text_to_render>
      <visual_object_description>大型矩形列车车窗，显示窗外模糊的风景。</visual_object_description>
      <anchor_point_directive>引线必须指向窗户玻璃。</anchor_point_directive>
    </binding_item>

    <binding_item>
      <exact_text_to_render>
        Line 1 (Bold): **通路**
        Line 2 (Small): /[つうろ]/
        Line 3 (Medium): 过道
      </exact_text_to_render>
      <visual_object_description>排与排座椅之间整洁的地板走道。</visual_object_description>
      <anchor_point_directive>引线必须指向过道的地板。</anchor_point_directive>
    </binding_item>

    <binding_item>
      <exact_text_to_render>
        Line 1 (Bold): **網棚**
        Line 2 (Small): /[あみだな]/
        Line 3 (Medium): 行李架
      </exact_text_to_render>
      <visual_object_description>座椅上方的头顶搁板，用于存放包袋。</visual_object_description>
      <anchor_point_directive>引线必须指向窗户上方的搁板结构。</anchor_point_directive>
    </binding_item>

    <binding_item>
      <exact_text_to_render>
        Line 1 (Bold): **切符**
        Line 2 (Small): /[きっぷ]/
        Line 3 (Medium): 车票
      </exact_text_to_render>
      <visual_object_description>一张放在托盘桌上的小型矩形列车票。</visual_object_description>
      <anchor_point_directive>引线必须指向车票。</anchor_point_directive>
    </binding_item>

    <binding_item>
      <exact_text_to_render>
        Line 1 (Bold): **車掌**
        Line 2 (Small): /[しゃしょう]/
        Line 3 (Medium): 列车员
      </exact_text_to_render>
      <visual_object_description>一名身穿制服的列车工作人员站在背景过道中。</visual_object_description>
      <anchor_point_directive>引线必须指向列车员。</anchor_point_directive>
    </binding_item>

    <binding_item>
      <exact_text_to_render>
        Line 1 (Bold): **駅弁**
        Line 2 (Small): /[えきべん]/
        Line 3 (Medium): 车站便当
      </exact_text_to_render>
      <visual_object_description>一个色彩鲜艳的便当盒午餐，放在托盘桌上。</visual_object_description>
      <anchor_point_directive>引线必须指向便当盒。</anchor_point_directive>
    </binding_item>

    <binding_item>
      <exact_text_to_render>
        Line 1 (Bold): **コンセント**
        Line 2 (Small): /[konsento]/
        Line 3 (Medium): 插座
      </exact_text_to_render>
      <visual_object_description>位于墙壁或座椅底部附近的电源插座。</visual_object_description>
      <anchor_point_directive>引线必须指向插孔。</anchor_point_directive>
    </binding_item>

    <binding_item>
      <exact_text_to_render>
        Line 1 (Bold): **フック**
        Line 2 (Small): /[fukku]/
        Line 3 (Medium): 挂钩
      </exact_text_to_render>
      <visual_object_description>窗户或座椅背面旁边墙上的小挂钩。</visual_object_description>
      <anchor_point_directive>引线必须指向小挂钩。</anchor_point_directive>
    </binding_item>

    <binding_item>
      <exact_text_to_render>
        Line 1 (Bold): **ブラインド**
        Line 2 (Small): /[buraindo]/
        Line 3 (Medium): 遮光帘
      </exact_text_to_render>
      <visual_object_description>拉下一半覆盖在窗户上的遮阳帘。</visual_object_description>
      <anchor_point_directive>引线必须指向拉下的遮阳帘。</anchor_point_directive>
    </binding_item>

    <binding_item>
      <exact_text_to_render>
        Line 1 (Bold): **ヘッドカバー**
        Line 2 (Small): /[heddokaba-]/
        Line 3 (Medium): 头靠套
      </exact_text_to_render>
      <visual_object_description>座椅顶部部分的白色布套。</visual_object_description>
      <anchor_point_directive>引线必须指向头枕上的白布。</anchor_point_directive>
    </binding_item>

    <binding_item>
      <exact_text_to_render>
        Line 1 (Bold): **荷物**
        Line 2 (Small): /[にもつ]/
        Line 3 (Medium): 行李
      </exact_text_to_render>
      <visual_object_description>一个安全放置在头顶

title: Chinese-English Vocabulary Cards
author: Brainstorming
prompt:
[Scene Description]**

A detailed, vibrant, and educational illustration of a busy and friendly **Hospital** scene. The scene includes a doctor examining a patient, a nurse holding a chart, and various medical equipment arranged neatly.

**Atmosphere:** Bright, warm, and positive. High saturation colors (Warm Tone) to reduce fear of hospitals.

**Style:** Children's book illustration style + Educational poster aesthetic. Vector illustration style, flat design with clean lines (No blurry 3D renders).



**[Labeling Requirements]**

- **Style:** "Sticker Style" labels (White background stickers with dark text).

- **Placement:** Labels must be placed IMMEDIATELY NEXT TO the corresponding objects. Do not block the main subject.

- **Text Format:** Strict 3-line format:

  Line 1: **TargetWord** (Bold)

  Line 2: /Phonetics/

  Line 3: [Chinese Meaning]



**[Vocabulary List to Label]**

- **Doctor** /ˈdɒktər/ [医生]

- **Nurse** /nɜːrs/ [护士]

- **Patient** /ˈpeɪʃnt/ [病人]

- **Stethoscope** /ˈstɛθəskoʊp/ [听诊器]

- **Mask** /mæsk/ [口罩]

- **Syringe** /sɪˈrɪndʒ/ [注射器]

- **Thermometer** /θərˈmɒmɪtər/ [体温计]

- **Hospital Bed** /ˈhɒspɪtl bɛd/ [病床]

- **Wheelchair** /ˈwiːltʃɛər/ [轮椅]

- **IV Drip** /ˌaɪ ˈviː drɪp/ [输液]

- **Pills** /pɪlz/ [药丸]

- **Bandage** /ˈbændɪdʒ/ [绷带]

- **X-ray** /ˈɛks reɪ/ [X光片]

- **First Aid Kit** /fɜːrst eɪd kɪt/ [急救箱]

- **White Coat** /waɪt koʊt/ [白大褂]

- **Crutches** /ˈkrʌtʃɪz/ [拐杖]

- **Plaster Cast** /ˈplæstər kæst/ [石膏]

- **Ambulance** /ˈæmbjələns/ [救护车]



**[Technical Specs]**

8k resolution, high detail, sharp focus, vector art, educational layout.
promptZh:
[场景描述]**

一幅详细、生动和教育性的医院场景的插画。场景包括医生检查患者，护士拿着病历，各种医疗设备排列整齐。

**气氛:** 亮丽温暖积极。高饱和度颜色（暖色调）以减少对医院的恐惧。

**风格:** 儿童书插画风格 + 教育性海报美学。向量艺术风格，平面设计与清晰线条（无模糊3D渲染）。



**[标签要求]**

- **风格:** "贴纸风格"标签（白色背景贴纸，黑色文本）。

- **位置:** 标签必须紧接着相应的对象放置。不要阻挡主要主体。

- **文本格式:** 严格三行格式:

  第一行：**目标词语**（粗体）

  第二行：/发音/

  第三行：[中文含义]



**[单词列表标签]**

- **医生** /ˈdɒktər/ [医生]

- **护士** /nɜːrs/ [护士]

- **病人** /ˈpeɪʃnt/ [病人]

- **听诊器** /ˈstɛθəskoʊp/ [听诊器]

- **口罩** /mæsk/ [口罩]

- **注射器** /sɪˈrɪndʒ/ [注射器]

- **体温计** /θərˈmɒmɪtər/ [体温计]

- **病床** /ˈhɒspɪtl bɛd/ [病床]

- **轮椅** /ˈwiːltʃɛər/ [轮椅]

- **输液** /ˌaɪ ˈviː drɪp/ [输液]

- **药丸** /pɪlz/ [药丸]

- **绷带** /ˈbændɪdʒ/ [绷带]

- **X光片** /ˈɛks reɪ/ [X光片]

- **急救箱** /fɜːrst eɪd kɪt/ [急救箱]

- **白大褂** /waɪt koʊt/ [白大褂]

- **拐杖** /ˈkrʌtʃɪz/ [拐杖]

- **石膏** /ˈplæstər kæst/ [石膏]

- **救护车** /ˈæmbjələns/ [救护车]

title: High-end Real Estate Poster
author: Larus Canus @MrLarus
prompt:
High-end real estate project vertical advertisement poster, which can be slightly modified to generate matte gold dark style posters with different themes.

Click "View Original " for detailed prompts.
promptZh:
高端地产项目竖版广告海报，稍加改造后可用以生成不同主题的哑光金暗黑风格海报。

点击”原始来源“获得详细提示词。

title: PPT, Infographics, X.com
author: 小小东@xiaoxiaodong01
prompt:
Images suitable for PPT, infographics, self-media covers, knowledge cards, business cards, or brand visuals. 

Click "View Original " for detailed prompts.
promptZh:
适用于 PPT、信息图、自媒体封面、知识卡片、名片或品牌视觉的图片。

点击”原始来源“获得详细提示词。
